core_problem.notes: The paper introduces a new architecture to solve machine translation / sequence transduction tasks, reporting results on WMT 2014 translation tasks.

proposed_method.notes: The paper proposes the Transformer, an attention-only neural network architecture built from self-attention, multi-head attention, feed-forward layers and positional encodings.

baselines.notes: The paper explicitly states comparisons against ByteNet, ConvS2S, and GNMT+RL.

datasets.notes: Experiments report results on WMT 2014 En-De and En-Fr benchmarks and additionally apply the model to English constituency parsing (dataset not explicitly named).

evaluation_metrics.notes: Evaluation uses BLEU score on the WMT 2014 translation benchmarks as explicitly stated.

application_domain.notes: The work is in NLP and deep learning, specifically targeting sequence-to-sequence tasks such as machine translation and parsing.
